title: Health Credential
description: Verifiable credential attesting that a person holds a health-related certification (e.g. fitness-for-duty, professional medical certification).

name.description: Full name of the credential subject.

certification.description: Name of the health certification (e.g. "Aviation Medical Class 1").

issuingBody.description: Legal name of the body that issued the certification.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) until which the certification is valid.
